presets.name: Collection
presets.children:
<Layout.Body>
  <Card>Card content</Card>
  <Card>Card content</Card>
  <Card>Card content</Card>
  <Card>Card content</Card>
  <Card>Card content</Card>
  <Card>Card content</Card>
</Layout.Body>

presets.name: Collection Detail
presets.children:
<Card padding="none">
  <Nav link="#" orientation="vertical" title="Menu">
    <NavItem link="#" text="Overview" />
    <NavItem active link="#" text="Activity" />
    <NavItem link="#" text="Files" />
  </Nav>
</Card>
<Layout.Body>
  <Card>Card content</Card>
  <Card>Card content</Card>
  <Card>Card content</Card>
  <Card>Card content</Card>
</Layout.Body>

presets.name: Content
presets.children:
<Layout.Header>
  <Card padding="sm"><Title size={4} text="Header" /></Card>
</Layout.Header>
<Layout.Side>
  <Card padding="sm"><Body text="Supporting navigation or metadata." /></Card>
</Layout.Side>
<Layout.Body>
  <Card padding="md"><Title size={3} text="Article Content" /><Body text="Main content area with a longer reading surface." /></Card>
</Layout.Body>
<Layout.Footer>
  <Card padding="sm"><Body text="Footer content" /></Card>
</Layout.Footer>

presets.name: Kanban
presets.children:
<Layout.Body>
  <Caption text="Queue" />
  <Card padding="sm"><Title size={4} text="Design Homepage" /><Body text="Owner: Ada" /></Card>
  <Card padding="sm"><Title size={4} text="Update Icons" /><Body text="Owner: Grace" /></Card>
</Layout.Body>
<Layout.Body>
  <Caption text="In Progress" />
  <Card padding="sm"><Title size={4} text="Dashboard Updates" /><Body text="Owner: Katherine" /></Card>
</Layout.Body>
<Layout.Body>
  <Caption text="Done" />
  <Card padding="sm"><Title size={4} text="QA Review" /><Body text="Owner: Margaret" /></Card>
</Layout.Body>

presets.name: Bracket
presets.children:
<Layout.RoundLabel>
  <Caption text="Semifinal" />
  <SectionSeparator marginY="sm" />
</Layout.RoundLabel>
<Layout.Round>
  <Layout.Game>
    <Layout.Participant name="Eagles" points="22" rank="#1" territory="PHI" winner />
    <Layout.Participant name="Packers" points="10" rank="#3" territory="GB" />
  </Layout.Game>
  <Layout.Game>
    <Layout.Participant name="Rams" points="27" rank="#1" territory="LAR" winner />
    <Layout.Participant name="Vikings" points="9" rank="#2" territory="MIN" />
  </Layout.Game>
</Layout.Round>
<Layout.RoundLabel>
  <Caption text="Final" />
  <SectionSeparator marginY="sm" />
</Layout.RoundLabel>
<Layout.Round>
  <Layout.Game>
    <Layout.Participant name="Eagles" points="24" rank="#1" self territory="PHI" winner />
    <Layout.Participant name="Rams" points="17" rank="#1" territory="LAR" />
  </Layout.Game>
</Layout.Round>

sidebar.message: Sidebar uses Layout.Side and Layout.Body, with sidebar controls for position, size, collapse, and variant.

right_sidebar.message: Right Sidebar moves Layout.Side to the right and uses the dark sidebar variant.

collection.message: Collection arranges repeated cards inside Layout.Body.

collection_detail.message: Collection Detail pairs navigation with a detail body area.

content.message: Content shows Header, Side, Body, and Footer regions together.

kanban.message: Kanban uses multiple Layout.Body columns and enables responsive mode.

masonry.message: Masonry uses Layout.Item sizes inside Layout.Body.

bracket.message: Bracket uses Layout.RoundLabel, Layout.Round, Layout.Game, and Layout.Participant.
